figure.title: Request and Response Flow Between Accelerators
figure.purpose: Illustrates the paths of requests and corresponding responses between two accelerators connected via a switch.

technical_summary: ACC A sends requests to ACC B through the UPLI Originator and UALink Stack.
The Switch Core routes ACC A's request to ACC B's UPLI Completer.
ACC B's response is returned via its UPLI Completer back through the switch to ACC A's UPLI Originator.
ACC B can simultaneously send requests to ACC A using its UPLI Originator.
ACC A responds to ACC B's requests via its UPLI Completer.

components.name: ACC A
components.description: Accelerator node acting as requester and responder

components.name: SWITCH
components.description: Intermediate switch routing UPLI protocol messages

components.name: ACC B
components.description: Accelerator node acting as requester and responder

critical_facts: Request channels and Response channels are logically distinct and maintain separate flow paths through the switch core.
